archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Retro-Futurism) paired with Glassmorphism

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-100
hierarchy.passphrase_display: font-mono text-3xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-[0.1em] font-light text-emerald-400 drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(52,211,153,0.5)] leading-tight

layout_and_spacing.structure: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12 w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6 md:p-12 items-stretch min-h-[80vh]
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4 space-y-8 flex flex-col justify-start w-full
layout_and_spacing.main_display: col-span-1 lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col justify-center space-y-12 w-full h-full
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for controls to enhance the 'control panel' feel. Passphrase display centered optically within its expansive container.

glassmorphism.class: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-emerald-500/30 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden
glassmorphism.usage: Main 'Cyber-Vault' display container and the sidebar controls container.

inputs.class: bg-slate-950/60 border border-slate-700 focus:border-emerald-500/60 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500/60 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-md

components_strategy.slider: Shadcn Slider, heavily customized. Use an emerald-400 background for the active track and a glowing thumb (`bg-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(52,211,153,0.8)]`).
components_strategy.select: Shadcn Select. Ensure the dropdown popover matches the glassmorphic dark theme (`bg-slate-900 border-emerald-500/30`).
components_strategy.switch: Shadcn Switch. Custom classes for active state (`data-[state=checked]:bg-emerald-500`).
components_strategy.strength_meter: A specialized progress bar component. Wrapper `h-2 w-full rounded-full bg-slate-800/80`. Fill element smoothly transitions `width` and `backgroundColor` based on the computed entropy.
components_strategy.copy_button: A utility action button positioned near the passphrase. Requires complex interaction: on-click -> set copied state -> trigger framer-motion path animation for a checkmark -> fire Sonner toast -> revert state after 2s.

motion_and_interactions.passphrase_glow: Subtle breathing/pulse animation on the text shadow to make the vault feel 'alive' when a phrase is generated.
motion_and_interactions.strength_transition: The fill bar MUST use `transition-all duration-700 ease-out` so the color and width slide gracefully when recalculating.

background_image.usage: Set as a fixed, absolute-positioned background behind the main `min-h-screen` container. Cover it with a heavy overlay (`bg-slate-950/80` or `bg-slate-950/90`) so it adds subtle texture without ruining contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: User overrode the original 'Flask + index.html' request with 'FastAPI + React'. Set up a standard React SPA frontend and FastAPI backend.
Frontend setup: Initialize React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
Install required fonts in index.css: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Build the UI using the 12-column grid specified in layout_and_spacing.
Apply the exact glassmorphism classes to the main containers. Include generous internal padding (`p-8` or `p-12`).
The passphrase output MUST be styled exactly as defined in typography.hierarchy.passphrase_display. It needs the neon glow.
Implement the Dual Feedback Copy mechanism: Clicking copy changes the clipboard icon to an animated checkmark (Framer Motion) and triggers a 'Copied!' Toast (Sonner).

Backend (FastAPI): Create `/api/generate` endpoint. Use Python's `secrets` module and a hardcoded list of 100+ distinct tech/cyber/nature nouns. Accept parameters: word_count (int, 3-8), separator (str), append_digit (bool).
The API must calculate rough bit-entropy based on the generated length and character space, and return it alongside the passphrase.
Bind the frontend UI controls state to fetch the generated passphrase. Update the strength meter's width (0-100%) and color dynamically based on the returned entropy.
